description: Classical mechanics verification set for the pilot oracle run. 10 facts, all well-established. Distractors match the four bias patterns from Paper 9 so failures are interpretable.

facts.context: kinetic energy of a mass m moving at speed v
facts.notes: The pilot fact. Model should prefer (1/2)mv² over mv.

facts.context: Coulomb's law: force between charges q1 and q2 separated by distance r
gravitational potential energy of mass m at height h
facts.notes: Should be unambiguous: mgh is standard.

facts.context: period of a simple pendulum of length L
facts.notes: Tests whether 2π survives against truncated form.

facts.context: work done by force F over displacement d
facts.notes: Truncation: model may drop the cos(θ) factor.

facts.context: electric field due to a point charge q at distance r
momentum of a particle with mass m and velocity v
Newton's second law: net force equals
facts.notes: Should be easy; confirms oracle is working at all.

facts.context: escape velocity from a planet of mass M and radius R
facts.notes: Tests whether the factor of 2 survives under the radical.
